channel.title: Lincoln Theatre Events
channel.description: Upcoming events at Lincoln Theatre in Raleigh, NC

item.description: General Admission Only

item.title: Delta Rae (Oct 24)
item.description: General Admission Only

item.title: Phillip Phillips w/ Katie Lynne Sharbaugh (Oct 23)
item.description: Phillip Phillips Meet & Greet Experience • One general admission ticket • Early entry into the venue • Exclusive meet and greet along with personal photograph • Access to a pre-show songwriters story time including an acoustic performance • Limited Edition corduroy hat • Exclusive signed setlist • Official meet & greet laminate • Priority merchandise shopping • On-site VIP host • Limited availability Package Disclaimer for dates not on Ticketmaster national spec: Thank you for purchasing a Phillip Phillips VIP package. Buyers will receive an email approximately three days prior to the show date with VIP details, sent to the address submitted at time of purchase. One More Time VIP, the artist, tour, promoter, ticketing company, venue or any other affiliated parties are not responsible for outdated or inaccurate information provided by the consumer. All packages and package contents are non-transferable; no refunds or exchanges; all sales are final. Package elements are subject to change. VIP merchandise items will be distributed at the show. If you have any questions regarding your VIP package elements, please contact info@onemoretimevip.com

item.title: Phillip Phillips w/ TBA (Oct 23)
item.description: Phillip Phillips Meet & Greet Experience • One general admission ticket • Early entry into the venue • Exclusive meet and greet with Phillip Phillips • Personal photograph with Phillip Phillips • Access to a pre-show songwriters story time with Phillip Phillips • Including an acoustic performance of a few secret songs • Limited Edition Phillip Phillips corduroy hat • Exclusive Phillip Phillips signed setlist • Official meet & greet laminate • Priority merchandise shopping • On-site VIP host • Limited availability Package Disclaimer for dates not on Ticketmaster national spec: Thank you for purchasing a Phillip Phillips VIP package. Buyers will receive an email approximately three days prior to the show date with VIP details, sent to the address submitted at time of purchase. One More Time VIP, the artist, tour, promoter, ticketing company, venue or any other affiliated parties are not responsible for outdated or inaccurate information provided by the consumer. All packages and package contents are non-transferable; no refunds or exchanges; all sales are final. Package elements are subject to change. VIP merchandise items will be distributed at the show. If you have any questions regarding your VIP package elements, please contact info@onemoretimevip.com

item.title: Isaiah falls (Oct 18)
item.description: VIP: Isaiah Falls Meet & Greet Package One general admission ticket Early entry into the venue Exclusive meet & greet with Isaiah Falls Personal photograph with Isaiah Falls Custom LVRS PARADISE dice keychain Official meet & greet laminate and lanyard, autographed by Isaiah Falls Priority merchandise shopping Limited availability *Buyers will receive an email approximately three days prior to the show date with VIP details, sent to the address submitted at time of purchase. One More Time VIP, the artist, tour, promoter, ticketing company, venue or any other affiliated parties are not responsible for outdated or inaccurate information provided by the consumer. All packages and package contents are non-transferable and not valid if purchased through fan-to-fan resale; no refunds or exchanges; all sales are final. Package elements are subject to change. VIP merchandise items will be distributed at the show. If you have any questions regarding your VIP package elements, please contact info@onemoretimevip.com.*

All packages and package contents are non-transferable and not valid if purchased through fan-to-fan resale; no refunds or exchanges; all sales are final. Package elements are subject to change. VIP merchandise items will be distributed at the show. If you have any questions regarding your VIP package elements, please contact info@onemoretimevip.com.*

item.title: Earlybirds Club (Jul 25)
item.description: Earlybirds Club is a dance party for women and gender-expansive folks that runs 6pm to 10pm — because we have sh*t to do in the morning! DJ Krystyle spins the songs that live in your bones: 80s, 90s, and 2000s pop, hip-hop, new wave, and R&B. But Earlybirds Club is more than a night out. It’s a permission slip to take up space. To be loud, weird, wild, sweaty, sparkly, sentimental, and completely yourself. It’s a judgment-free dance floor built on joy, kindness, connection, and the shared understanding that sensible footwear is a love language. 10% of ticket proceeds go to the Susie Lee Legacy Fund, supporting nonprofits that uplift women, gender-expansive people, and communities who need it most. Note: By purchasing these tickets, you are consenting to be photographed for promotional purposes. People of all backgrounds and identities are encouraged to attend all of our events.

item.title: Earlybirds Club (Jul 25)
item.description: Earlybirds Club is a dance party for women and gender-expansive folks that runs 6pm to 10pm — because we have sh*t to do in the morning! DJ Krystyle spins the songs that live in your bones: 80s, 90s, and 2000s pop, hip-hop, new wave, and R&B. But Earlybirds Club is more than a night out. It’s a permission slip to take up space. To be loud, weird, wild, sweaty, sparkly, sentimental, and completely yourself. It’s a judgment-free dance floor built on joy, kindness, connection, and the shared understanding that sensible footwear is a love language. 10% of ticket proceeds go to the Susie Lee Legacy Fund, supporting nonprofits that uplift women, gender-expansive people, and communities who need it most. Note: By purchasing these tickets, you are consenting to be photographed for promotional purposes. People of all backgrounds and identities are encouraged to attend all of our events.

Guardians of the Jukebox (The Greatest 80s Show on Earth) (Aug 21)
item.description: Guardians Of The Jukebox is a band based in Atlanta, featuring world class musicians and Grammy nominated recording artists from Fozzy and Stuck Mojo The world's greatest tribute to the glory years of MTV's pop, rock, new romantic and new wave era!
